title: calea diffusa
intro: Calea diffusa, also known as Mexican Damiana, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, antianxiety, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Calea diffusa include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and stress, as well as improvements in libido and menopausal symptoms. Calea diffusa is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be added to herbal blends to support overall well-being.
